meaning: n.<法>官方证明信件,车票簿
examples: In addition, the new A4 format will enable the electronic transmission of the carnet in the future.
The renewed ATA carnet may, upon confirmation of the local competent customs office, replace the former carnet.
In addition, the continuation sheets will be numbered to indicate the number of continuation sheet (s) in a carnet.
Ce carnet de route est le premier d'un long processus de capitalisation.
If you go home regularly on the train after 7pm it will save you a considerable amount of money if you get a peak-fare carnet for the morning and an off-peak one for the evening.
